detail.description: Chuckie Robinson flies out to center fielder Byron Buxton.
Chuckie Robinson out on a sacrifice bunt, pitcher Travis Adams to second baseman Luke Keaschall. Alex Call scores. Alex Freeland to 2nd.
Chuckie Robinson singles on a ground ball to right fielder Kyler Fedko. Alex Freeland to 2nd.
Chuckie Robinson singles on a line drive to left fielder Austin Martin. Alex Call to 3rd.
Chuckie Robinson grounds into a force out, third baseman Brooks Lee to second baseman Luke Keaschall. Alex Call out at 2nd. Chuckie Robinson to 1st.
Chuckie Robinson flies out to right fielder Kody Clemens.
Chuckie Robinson grounds out, second baseman Jeremiah Jackson to first baseman Pete Alonso.
Chuckie Robinson grounds out, shortstop Gunnar Henderson to first baseman Pete Alonso.
Chuckie Robinson pops out to catcher Nick Fortes in foul territory.
Chuckie Robinson grounds into a force out, fielded by second baseman Ben Williamson. Alex Freeland out at 2nd.
Chuckie Robinson pops out to shortstop Xander Bogaerts.
Chuckie Robinson grounds out softly, pitcher Yuki Matsui to first baseman Gavin Sheets. Kyle Tucker to 2nd.
Chuckie Robinson out on a sacrifice bunt, pitcher Michael King to first baseman Gavin Sheets. Alex Freeland to 2nd.
Chuckie Robinson pops out to shortstop Sung-Mun Song.
Chuckie Robinson pops out to second baseman Chase Meidroth.
Chuckie Robinson grounds out, third baseman Miguel Vargas to first baseman Jacob Gonzalez.
Chuckie Robinson out on a sacrifice bunt, catcher Drew Romo to second baseman Chase Meidroth. Max Muncy to 3rd. Santiago Espinal to 2nd.
Chuckie Robinson grounds out, third baseman Joshua Kuroda-Grauer to first baseman Nick Kurtz.
Chuckie Robinson flies out to right fielder Lawrence Butler.
Chuckie Robinson bunt pops out softly to third baseman Joshua Kuroda-Grauer.
